evals.prompt: Every section fades and slides in on scroll. The page is still understandable without it. Decide what to keep.
evals.expected_output: The reveals are classified as nonessential and removed or reduced with content visible by default.
assertions: The page content remains available when motion is disabled.
The decision does not keep motion merely for polish.

evals.prompt: A save action moves a checkmark into view and also updates status text. Design the reduced-motion behavior.
evals.expected_output: Status text is preserved and the movement is reduced or replaced when motion is reduced.

evals.prompt: The site converts wheel input into full-screen slides. Users cannot freely stop between sections.
evals.expected_output: Scroll hijacking is a hard gate and is removed or replaced with native user-controlled scrolling.
assertions: The output does not recommend tuning the effect as the only fix.
An equivalent user-controlled path is required.
